# Evaporite Sedimentology

**Summary**: The study of minerals that precipitate from water as it evaporates.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] investigated evaporite-sedimentology to understand the distribution of gypsum and halite.

## Scientific Context

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Determining the role of hydrology and climate in mineral precipitation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Mineralogical analysis via XRD and SEM.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Evaporite sedimentation is primarily found on the downwind side of the sabkha due to wind influence. ([[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994, p. 12]])
